MOVING PARTY SHALL IMMEDIATELY PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS, INCLUDING THE PETITION, TO DEPARTMENT 302 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MARLA J. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees Against Respondent Cisco Technology, Inc.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2013 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees Against Respondent Cisco Technology, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2013 Continued To Oct-03-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERS CATELLUS DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, PROLOGIS LOGISTICS SERVICE INCORPORATED, PALMTREE ACQUISITION CORPORATION, PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PROLOGIS and CATELLUS MIXED LAND, LLC'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees Against Respondent Cisco Technology, Inc. is continued to October 3, 2013 per agreement of all parties. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Amended Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar May-31-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mohammad Walizadeh, Esq. (415.995.5802) and Michael McNaughton, Esq. (415.995.5085) of Hanson Bridgett, for petitioners and moving party;
Richard Gallagher, Esq. and James E. Burns, Jr., Esq. of Orrick Herrington & Sutcliffe, Tel. 650.614.7387, for respondents and opposing party.

RULING: A R G U E D. At the conclusion of argument, the Court ruled as follows: PETITIONERS CATELLUS DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, PROLOGIS LOGISTICS SERVICE INCORPORATED, PALMTREE ACQUISITION CORPORATION, CATELLUS OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PROLOGIS AND CATELLUS MIXED LAND, LLC'S Amended Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185

Amended Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Continued To May-31-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs CATELLUS DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, PROLOGIS LOGISTICS SERVICE INCORPORATED, PALMTREE ACQUISITION CORPORATION, CATELLUS OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PROLOGIS & CATELLUS MIXED LAND, LLC's Amended Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is continued on the Court's own motion to May 31, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Amended Petition To Confirm Arb Award
Off Calendar May-01-2013 Continued To May-15-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONERs CATELLUS DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION, PROLOGIS LOGISTICS SERVICE INCORPORATED, PALMTREE ACQUISITION CORPORATION, CATELLUS OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PAC OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP, PROLOGIS, CATELLUS MIXED LAND, LLC Amended Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award IS Continued to May 15, 2013 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party shall immediately provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, including the Petition, to Department 302 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-05-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is off calendar. Per amended Petition, the matter will be heard on May 1, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer #5976.
